title: feat: deploy economics on Cloudflare Workers
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Moves the Economics password gate and allowlisted Tinybird proxy into a Cloudflare Worker.
- Serves the React app at `economics.myceli.ai` and `economics.pollinations.ai` from one Myceli-account Worker.
- Adds the Economics app, dedicated SOPS key, deployment, and endpoint checks to the operations workflow.
- Keeps the legacy Grafana droplet untouched until the Worker cutover and Observability alerting are verified.

Validation:
- 163 Vitest tests pass.
- TypeScript check passes.
- Wrangler production build and deploy dry-run pass.
- Local Worker preview returns the app and unauthenticated session response.

gist.headline: Economics grows worker wings
gist.blurb: The Economics dashboard packed its password gate and Tinybird proxy into a Cloudflare Worker. One small worker now tends both Myceli and Pollinations garden gates.
gist.summary: Moved the Economics React app, password gate, and allowlisted Tinybird proxy into a single Myceli-account Cloudflare Worker serving economics.myceli.ai and economics.pollinations.ai, with deployment and endpoint checks added to operations.
gist.impact: Operations can deploy and verify the Economics app from Cloudflare Workers while the existing Grafana droplet remains available through the cutover and alerting validation.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy garden operations shed where Polly helps a friendly CRT monitor robot move the Economics dashboard from an old Grafana droplet-shaped planter into a compact Cloudflare Worker beehive. Show two small signposts for economics.myceli.ai and economics.pollinations.ai, a protected gate, Tinybird data slips, and sprouting code-plants to represent the migrated app, proxy, and deployment checks.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny operations helmet, guiding a cheerful CRT monitor robot as it carries glowing Tinybird data slips into a small Cloudflare Worker beehive beside two garden signposts reading “economics.myceli.ai” and “economics.pollinations.ai”; an old droplet-shaped planter rests safely nearby, with code-plants and flowers growing around it. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, nostalgic but beautiful.
